prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "9A. Controls and Procedures" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 9B. Other Information".
First find the bottom edge of Item 9A's text:
- If the "Item 9B" heading is visible on this page, the bottom edge is the line directly ABOVE it.
- Otherwise the bottom edge is the very last line of text on the page.
Starting from that bottom edge and reading UPWARD, transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of Item 9A — the lines physically closest to the bottom edge. Do NOT return lines from the top or middle of the page, and ignore any bulleted summary list higher up. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
degree of compliance with the policies or procedures may deteriorate.

/s/ BDO USA, P.C.

Chicago, Illinois
August 4, 2025
